---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Weave
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?
     e.g. "When using two skill sets from different platforms, I have to manually pick
     which one to activate. There's no way to let Weave choose automatically." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see added or changed. Be as specific as possible.
     e.g. "Add a --auto flag to weave query that selects skills by cosine similarity
     score automatically." -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't choose them.
     e.g. "I considered adding a weave.yaml rule per query type, but that requires
     manual maintenance and doesn't scale." -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Links, references, related issues, mockups, prior art in other tools, etc. -->
